title: equisetum sylvaticum f. praecox
intro: Equisetum sylvaticum f. praecox, also known as spring horsetail or early horsetail, is a variant of the Equisetum sylvaticum plant, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the horsetail family (Equisetaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, due to the presence of silica, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of spring horsetail include improving joint health, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting urinary tract health. Equisetum sylvaticum f. praecox is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
